name: obsidian-notification-aggregator
description: Aggregates multiple notices into a single notification to prevent UI clutter.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p ../../notes/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-notification-aggregator && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css ../../notes/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-notification-aggregator/
